title: Tab Switcher

statement.markdown:
## Tab Switcher
### Requirements
1. Create a tab switcher component with at least 3 tabs
2. Each tab should contain a unique heading
3. Add a button to switch between tabs
4. Use JavaScript to handle tab switching
5. Use Tailwind CSS classes for styling

constraints: Tab switching should be done using JavaScript
No external libraries or frameworks other than Tailwind CSS can be used
Use HTML and CSS for visual styling
